rationale: Matches the high-energy, vibrant Anime Battle Arena (ABA) style while bringing in clear competitive gaming aesthetics. Integrates the requested tropical background with heavy contrasts for UI legibility.

spacing_and_layout.roster_grid: grid-cols-4 sm:grid-cols-6 lg:grid-cols-8 gap-2 p-4 bg-black rounded-lg

components.buttons: Heavy, saturated colors, bold uppercase text (Bebas Neue). Use deep drop shadows or bottom borders to simulate 3D depth (e.g., border-b-4 border-black/50). Hover states should increase brightness and slightly translate up.
components.character_cards: Black background, solid red border (border-2 border-red-600), squared edges (no border-radius) or subtle 2px. Fixed aspect ratio (e.g., aspect-[3/4]). Image should fill the card.
components.top_banner: Dark, slightly transparent black banner (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md) with a golden accent or bottom border. Hosts the main logo.
components.turn_indicator: High-contrast block in the center of the draft screen. Blinking or pulsing animation (animate-pulse) when it is someone's turn.

motion.hover: Scale up (scale-105) for character cards, slight translateY (-translate-y-1) for buttons.

backgrounds.description: Tropical ocean background for the main lobby

logos.description: Golden ABA text logo with black accents

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Bebas Neue' from Google Fonts for all headings and button texts.
Set the main layout background to the tropical ocean image (app_background), full screen, fixed, and cover.
Implement the UI overlays with translucent dark backgrounds (`bg-black/80`) to ensure readability over the bright tropical background.
For the Top Banner, place the 'main_logo' centered or on the left. The banner should be dark.

For buttons, mimic the colorful 3D-like style from ABA: use bright colors (from the guidelines), thick bold text, and a bottom border to create a faux-3D button effect. Example class: `bg-orange-500 border-b-4 border-orange-700 hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:border-b-2 active:border-b-0`.

The character roster must be a grid inside a black container. Each character item should have a red border (`border-2 border-red-600`), and NO border-radius. Populate with the placeholder images where character assets are missing.
In the draft screen, strictly implement the pick/ban flow: 1 ban, 1 ban, first team pick 1, second team pick 2, 2 bans, first team pick 2, second team pick 2, first team pick 1.
Ensure all interactive elements have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case.
